title: Kamal Haasan Promises Eco-Tourism Boost in Udhagamandalam Rally
summary: Kamal Haasan addresses a massive rally promising an eco-tourism boost in Udhagamandalam, focusing on sustainable hill station development.

title: DMK's Senthil Campaigns Among Tea Estate Workers
summary: DMK candidate R. Senthil campaigns door-to-door among tea estate workers in Udhagamandalam today, focusing on wages and welfare.

title: AIADMK Promises Wage Hike for Tea Plantation Labourers
summary: AIADMK nominee promises wage hike and improved housing for tea plantation labourers in Coonoor constituency.

title: TVK Distributes Booth Slips in Gudalur
summary: TVK workers distribute booth slips to tourists and locals in Gudalur today as part of grassroots voter outreach.

title: BJP Highlights Tourism Promotion in Udhagamandalam
summary: BJP candidate highlights central tourism promotion schemes during a roadshow in Udhagamandalam.

title: Flying Squads Seize Cash from Vehicles in Kotagiri
summary: Flying squads seize unaccounted cash from vehicles in Kotagiri (SC) constituency under model code enforcement.

title: DMK Vows Better Tribal Welfare in Kotagiri
summary: DMK candidate in Kotagiri vows better tribal welfare and stronger forest rights implementation for hill communities.

title: NTK Awareness Camps in Remote Gudalur Tribal Hamlets
summary: NTK activists organise voter awareness camps in remote Gudalur tribal hamlets to ensure inclusive participation.

title: Nilgiris Collector Reviews Election Preparedness
summary: Nilgiris Collector reviews election preparedness in the district control room with police and observers.

title: Paramilitary Deployed at Sensitive Polling Stations
summary: Paramilitary forces have been deployed at sensitive polling stations across Kotagiri hills for safe polling.

title: SVEEP Street Plays Near Ooty Botanical Gardens
summary: SVEEP teams conduct street plays on voting rights near the Ooty botanical gardens to engage tourists and locals.

title: Vijay Interacts with Dairy Farmers in Coonoor
summary: TVK star campaigner Vijay interacts with dairy farmers in Coonoor today, promising better procurement prices.

title: Home Voting for Elderly Tea Workers in Kotagiri
summary: Home voting facility arranged for elderly tea workers in Kotagiri (SC) constituency.

title: MCC Violation Booked Against Vehicle in Udhagamandalam
summary: Flying squads booked a model code violation against a campaign vehicle in Udhagamandalam.

title: AIADMK Assures Power Supply to Tea Factories
summary: AIADMK candidate assures uninterrupted power supply to tea factories in Gudalur.

title: BJP Campaigns on Horticulture Development
summary: BJP workers campaign on horticulture development for small farmers in Coonoor.

title: Observer Visits EVM Randomization Centre
summary: An election observer visits the EVM randomization centre in Udhagamandalam.

title: Postal Ballot Surge from Tourism Sector Employees
summary: Postal ballot applications increase among Nilgiris tourism sector employees ahead of polling.

title: TVK Promises Cold Storage for Horticulture Produce
summary: TVK candidate promises modern cold storage for horticulture produce in Gudalur.

title: Cash Seizure Near Coonoor Bus Stand
summary: Cash seizure reported from a vehicle during checks near Coonoor bus stand.

title: DEO Conducts Voter Awareness in Hill Hamlets
summary: The District Election Officer led an awareness drive in remote hill hamlets across Nilgiris.

title: EVM Commissioning Underway in Nilgiris Constituencies
summary: Election officials in Nilgiris have begun the commissioning of EVMs and VVPATs in the presence of candidate agents and observers ahead of the polling day.

title: DMK Intensifies Final-Phase Outreach in Nilgiris
summary: DMK candidates and alliance workers have intensified door-to-door outreach across Nilgiris, focusing on welfare scheme beneficiaries and first-time voters.

title: SVEEP Street Plays Boost Voter Awareness in Nilgiris
summary: SVEEP teams in Nilgiris performed street plays at bus stands and markets to encourage 100% voter turnout on April 23.

title: Flying Squads Intensify Vehicle Checks in Nilgiris
summary: Flying squads in Nilgiris have intensified vehicle checks at major entry points and highway intersections to curb illegal cash movement.

title: Nilgiris Reports Smooth Progress on Postal Ballot Distribution
summary: District election officials confirmed that postal ballot distribution to service voters and senior citizens in Nilgiris is progressing as per schedule.

title: AIADMK Holds Booth-Level Worker Meetings in Nilgiris
summary: AIADMK held booth-level worker meetings across Nilgiris to finalize polling-day strategy and voter mobilization plans.

title: Nilgiris Colleges Host Voter Pledge Programs
summary: Colleges across Nilgiris hosted voter pledge programs for first-time voters, accompanied by mock EVM demonstrations.

title: Nilgiris Static Surveillance Teams Report Daily to Observers
summary: Static surveillance teams in Nilgiris are reporting daily to election observers on cash, liquor, and freebie movement.

title: Strong Rooms Sealed in Nilgiris After Final Randomization
summary: EVM strong rooms across Nilgiris have been sealed under multi-tier security following the final randomization of polling personnel.

title: BJP Highlights Central Schemes During Nilgiris Roadshow
summary: BJP candidates conducted a roadshow in Nilgiris highlighting central government welfare schemes and infrastructure investments.

title: Booth Slip Distribution Crosses Halfway Mark in Nilgiris
summary: Door-to-door booth slip distribution in Nilgiris has crossed the halfway mark, with BLOs targeting full coverage by April 18.

title: MCC Violation Notices Issued in Nilgiris Constituencies
summary: Several model code of conduct violation notices have been issued in Nilgiris constituencies for unauthorised hoardings and campaign material.

title: Nilgiris Collector Reviews Polling Station Readiness
summary: The District Collector held a review meeting with returning officers in Nilgiris to assess polling station readiness, water supply, and accessibility ramps.

summary: TVK cadre led by local coordinators stepped up the door-to-door campaign across Nilgiris, distributing pamphlets and party manifestos.

summary: The Nilgiris district administration has installed voter awareness hoardings at major junctions, urging citizens to exercise their franchise.

summary: Nilgiris district police have beefed up security at sensitive booths with paramilitary deployment and additional patrol vehicles.

summary: Mock polls were demonstrated to candidate representatives in Nilgiris as part of EVM transparency measures before the April 23 election.

summary: Congress alliance workers held street-corner meetings in Nilgiris to highlight the alliance's promises on education and healthcare.

summary: The state voter helpline has seen a spike in calls from Nilgiris, mostly enquiring about polling station details and voter slip status.

summary: A significant liquor seizure was reported during routine election-related checks in Nilgiris, and the contraband has been impounded.

summary: Booth-level officers in Nilgiris have concluded the final voter list verification, ensuring electoral roll accuracy ahead of polling.

summary: Differently-abled voters in Nilgiris are receiving dedicated transport and assistance arrangements from the district election office.

summary: Income Tax teams have been conducting discreet surveys in Nilgiris to track unaccounted financial flows linked to the election period.
